name: AmpliTech Group, Inc.
summary: PART I Overview AmpliTech Group Inc. (AMPG, AmpliTech or the Company), incorporated in 2010 in the State of Nevada, is the parent company of AmpliTech, Inc., and the Companys divisions, Specialty Microwave, Spectrum Semiconductor Materials, AmpliTech Group MMIC Design Center (AGMDC) and AmpliTech Group True G Speed Services (AGTGSS).
